title: Record Discovery Receipt
description: A privacy service found a record about a user at a data broker.

user_commitment.description: Hash of user identity claim. NOT the identity itself.

service_id.description: Which privacy service found this (e.g. deleteme, incogni, manual)

broker_id.description: Normalized broker identifier (e.g. spokeo, whitepages, beenverified)

broker_url.description: Broker site or profile URL (optional, may be redacted)

record_category.description: Category of data found. NOT the data itself.

confidence.description: Confidence that this record is actually about the user (0-1). Industry average is ~0.41.

evidence_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the raw finding (screenshot, HTML, API response). Raw evidence stays local.

raw_pii_stored.description: This receipt NEVER contains raw PII. Always false.

previous_receipt_hash.description: SHA-256 of previous receipt in chain (empty string for first receipt)
